description: Canonical tri-source evidence packet for launcher routing. Read-only surface for backend and launcher coordination; not a promotion decision.

packet_id.description: Stable packet identifier for routing lineage and read-back.

question.description: Original launcher question used to build the packet.

domain.description: Domain or org scope used during retrieval.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the packet was created.

tri_source_ready.description: True when research, regulatory, and enterprise families all have usable evidence.

families.description: Canonical tri-source evidence families for the launcher surface.

family.description: Canonical evidence families used by the launcher routing surface.

status.description: Availability state for one evidence family inside the launcher packet.

summary.description: Family-level summary used for launcher reasoning and UI surfacing.

evidence_items.description: Top evidence items selected for this family.

items.description: One surfaced evidence item inside the launcher packet.

id.description: Stable evidence identifier or runtime-derived synthetic key.

family.description: Canonical evidence families used by the launcher routing surface.

title.description: Human-readable evidence title suitable for launcher surfacing.

summary.description: Short evidence summary for routing and operator review.

source_type.description: Origin type such as graphrag, regulation, governance_read_model, or runtime_readback.

evidence_ref.description: Reference path, query id, or runtime correlation id for read-back.

evidence_refs.description: References used for routing transparency and later read-back.

can_promote.description: Launcher evidence packets are read-only and cannot promote by themselves.

blocking_reasons.description: Coverage gaps or governance blockers detected while building the packet.
